decisions.rationale: The observation describes Nostrand Avenue from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay in Brooklyn, which is the same real-world corridor as the existing registry record corridor_nostrand-avenue — the observation's own base_record_id. The payloads match on corridor name, borough, limits, and endpoints. The observation already resolves to this id; no different target exists to link to.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
